content.speakerText: Alright, I'm glad we're on the same page. Keep me posted on your progress.
content.speakerTextCn: 很好，我们想法一致了，进展记得告诉我。

options.text: Thank you so much for your time and guidance—I really appreciate it.

content.explanation: 正确答案表达了对对方时间和指导的真诚感谢，符合礼貌道别和体现专业素养的要求。'Okay, bye' 虽然语法正确，但过于随意，缺乏感恩态度；'I'll call you later' 与对方要求的'keep me posted'不匹配，且未致谢；'That sounds boring' 是不礼貌且无关的回应。

content.speakerText: Thanks for helping me with the application process. I couldn't have done it without you.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你帮我完成申请流程，没有你我根本做不到。

options.text: You're welcome! I'm really happy I could help. Please keep me updated on your results!

content.explanation: 正确答案既回应了感谢，又表达了愿意继续支持的态度，符合礼貌道别中积极、专业、温暖的语境。'No problem, see you around' 虽然常见，但语气过于随意，缺乏对对方情感的回应；后两个选项冷漠无礼，完全不符合场景要求。

content.speakerText: Our meeting has come to an end. I really value your insights.
content.speakerTextCn: 我们的会议到此结束，我非常珍惜您的见解。

options.text: Thank you for your valuable time and thoughtful advice—I’m truly grateful.
Can we reschedule? I’m not done yet.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了正式、真诚的表达方式，与对方的尊重语气匹配。'Cool, later!' 和 'I guess that’s it then' 都过于随意，缺乏专业性；'Can we reschedule?' 与对方表达的'会议结束'矛盾，且未致谢，不符合道别语境。

content.template: Thank you so much for your time and ___—I really appreciate it.
content.hint: 在学术或职业指导场景中，对方提供的是建议或指导，而非金钱或简单的帮助。
content.knowledgePoint: 固定搭配：time and guidance（时间和指导）

content.template: I truly ___ your support during this process.
content.hint: 表达感激时，常用动词是 appreciate，比 like 更正式、更贴切。
这是英语口语中非常常见的道别感谢表达，强调再次感谢。
content.knowledgePoint: 惯用表达：Thanks again（再次感谢）

content.speakerText: Alright, I'm glad we're on the same page. Keep me posted on your progress.
content.speakerTextCn: 很好，我们想法一致了，进展记得告诉我。
expectedAnswers: Thank you so much for your time and guidance—I really appreciate it.
Will do! Thanks again for all your help!
I really appreciate your support and will update you soon. Have a great day!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了感谢并回应了对方的期待
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无明显错误
表达自然度：符合英语母语者日常礼貌道别习惯
关键词覆盖：是否包含 time/guidance/appreciate/thanks 等关键词

content.speakerText: I really appreciate your advice on my personal statement. It made a big difference.
content.speakerTextCn: 我非常感谢你对我个人陈述的建议，这产生了很大影响。
expectedAnswers: You're so welcome! I'm glad I could help. Please let me know how it goes!
Thank you for saying that—it means a lot to me. Wishing you the best of luck!
I'm happy to help anytime. Keep me posted on your results!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了感谢并表达了继续支持的意愿
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了恰当的感谢与祝福表达
表达自然度：语气真诚、温暖，符合英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否包含 welcome/help/luck/keep me posted 等关键词

content.speakerText: Our session is over. Thank you for sharing your experience and insights.
content.speakerTextCn: 我们的会谈结束了，感谢你分享你的经验和见解。
expectedAnswers: It was my pleasure. Thank you for your thoughtful questions and time.
I truly appreciate the opportunity to speak with you. Wishing you all the best!
Thank you for listening—I’ve learned a lot too. Let’s stay in touch!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了双向感谢，体现尊重与专业性
语言准确性：使用了正式且得体的表达，无语法错误
表达自然度：语气真诚，符合职场或学术场合的道别习惯
关键词覆盖：是否包含 pleasure/appreciate/opportunity/let’s stay in touch 等关键词
